name: Mawana Sugars Limited
summary: Mawana Sugars Limited manufactures and markets sugar under the Mawana brand in India. The company operates through Sugar, Power, Chemicals, and Distillery segments. It produces plantation white, refined, and specialty sugars, as well as IP grade sugar for pharmaceutical use. The company also offers chemical products, such as caustic soda, chlorine, stable bleaching powder, hydrogen, and hydrochloric acid. In addition, it is involved in the cogeneration of power from bagasse; and manufacture and sale of anhydrous and hydrous ethanol, including rectified spirit, denatured spirit, fuel ethanol, organic manure, and fusel oil to oil marketing companies. The company was formerly known as Siel Limited and changed its name to Mawana Sugars Limited in January 2008. Mawana Sugars Limited was incorporated in 1961 and is based in Gurugram, India.
